UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-03-2017 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 1
Judge Pro Tem: Rachel Erlich, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Darryl C. Leung is present.
Attorney Matthew P. Quiring for the plaintiff.
Defendant David A. Miller is present in pro per.
Non-party Trevor Thomas is present
Attorney Dalmar Ismall appearing for non-party.

**Per plaintiff and defense counsel, non-party Trevor Thomas will be part of the settlement discussions. Informed counsel that the non-party has no bearing in the court records and only the named defendant's signature will be required if settling.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of January 3, 2016 remains on calendar. (501)
